part.text: I’ll inspect the target-side SVDF implementation and validate the minimal hunk against the specified base before editing the checkout.

The target file has the same vulnerable pattern: `num_filters % rank` and `num_filters / rank` occur before any zero-rank guard. I’m applying the one-line guard immediately before the modulo operation.
